response.justification: Bogdan has broad engineering experience across languages and domains, with notable contributions to tooling and open-source projects, but lacks explicit, recent experience with JVM ecosystems, Spring, or enterprise IDE tooling — key requirements for this role. His Java exposure is mentioned only in passing from older roles, with no evidence of deep JVM internals or IDE subsystem work.
strengths: Proven track record in developer tooling and open-source contributions (e.g., GISCollective, Fluent-Asserts)
Strong cross-stack engineering skills with experience in CI/CD, testing, and performance optimization
Excellent communication and teaching ability, demonstrated through workshops and technical talks
concerns: No clear evidence of recent or deep work with Java/Kotlin, Spring, or JVM tooling in last 5+ years
Primary recent tech stack is TypeScript/Node.js/DLang, not enterprise Java ecosystems
IDE internals, build tool integration, or application server integration not mentioned in any role
